use_cases: Expanding FAQ sections on documentation or help pages
Accordion navigation menus with nested categories
Collapsible content sections in landing pages
Expandable details panels in data-dense interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible collapsible component built on Radix UI primitives. Provides smooth open/close animations with CSS-driven transitions and supports keyboard navigation. The component wraps Radix Collapsible with semantic data-slot attributes for styling and testability, making it ideal for building accordion interfaces, FAQ sections, and expandable content panels.
